message:
🌱 Add ollama: Support for OpenAI Responses API (for Codex CLI mission (#977)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-10309-support-for-openai-responses-api-for-codex-cli-compatibility",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Support for OpenAI Responses API (for Codex CLI compatibility)",
+    "description": "Support for OpenAI Responses API (for Codex CLI compatibility). Requested by 60+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis feature requires a recent Ollama version with Responses API support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review Codex CLI compatibility",
+        "description": "The [OpenAI Codex CLI](https://github.com/openai/codex) uses the `/v1/responses` endpoint for agent-like terminal functionality. This PR adds basic support for the `/v1/responses` endpoint to enable Codex CLI compatibility with Ollama."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure Codex CLI with Ollama",
+        "description": "Configure Codex CLI to use Ollama:\n```bash\nexport OPENAI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1\nexport OPENAI_API_KEY=ollama\n```\nThen run Codex CLI as usual. See the [source PR](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/10316) for implementation details."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify Codex CLI works with Ollama",
+        "description": "Test that Codex CLI can communicate with Ollama. Ensure a model is running:\n```bash\nollama list\n```\nThen test with Codex CLI to confirm agent-like terminal functionality works."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Basic support for the /v1/responses endpoint was added to Ollama, enabling compatibility with OpenAI Codex CLI.",

+    }
+  },
